name: Infinite Ore Corp.
summary: Infinite Ore Corp., a junior mineral exploration company, engages in acquiring, exploring, and evaluating mineral properties in North America. It primarily explores for lithium deposits. The company holds a 100% interest in the Jackpot Lithium property located in Thunder Bay, Ontario; and a 100% interest in the Cross Lake Lithium property comprising one mineral exploration license covering an area of 5,040 hectares located in the north of Winnipeg, Manitoba. It also holds interests in the Eastern Vision property consisting of 5 claims totaling 80 units covering an area of 1,425 hectares; and the North Buffy Lake property comprising 9 claims totaling 193 units covering an area of approximately 3,440 hectares located in the Red Lake District, Ontario. In addition, the company has an option agreement to acquire a 100% interest Dixie 3 and Ben Lake properties; a 90% interest in the Dixie Ten-Mile properties; an 80% interest in Garnet Lake property; an 80% interest in Fredart property comprising 171 contiguous mineral claims covering an area of 2,620 hectares; and a 100% interest in the Northern Vision property located in the Red Lake District, Ontario. Further, it holds an interest in the Electra property situated in Mexico. The company was formerly known as Infinite Lithium Corp. and changed its name to Infinite Ore Corp. in March 2020. Infinite Ore Corp. was incorporated in 2004 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
